rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports belong in component type scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion
Do not place implementation-specific bindings in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type scopes are for assumptions/guarantees; implementation scopes are for assignments
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract syntax and equation declarations
